message: Split unit and integration test execution

files.patch:
@@ -612,11 +612,12 @@ jobs:
           path: ${{ env.CCACHE_DIR }}
           key: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ matrix.tenzir.name }}-${{ matrix.tenzir.compiler }}-${{ needs.configure.outputs.ref-slug }}-${{ github.sha }}
           enableCrossOsArchive: true
-      - name: Run Unit and Integration Tests
-        env:
-          CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE: YES
+      - name: Run Unit Tests
+        run: |
+          cmake --build "$BUILD_DIR" --target unit-tests
+      - name: Run Integration Tests
         run: |
-          cmake --build "$BUILD_DIR" --target test
+          cmake --build "$BUILD_DIR" --target integration-tests
       - name: Install
         run: |
           cmake --install "$BUILD_DIR"

@@ -944,6 +944,23 @@ add_subdirectory(libtenzir)
 add_subdirectory(libtenzir_test)
 add_subdirectory(tenzir)
 
+if (BUILD_TESTING)
+  add_custom_target(
+    unit-tests
+    COMMAND ${CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND} --force-new-ctest-process --output-on-failure
+            --label-regex unit --build-config $<CONFIG>
+    WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}
+    USES_TERMINAL VERBATIM)
+  add_dependencies(unit-tests tenzir)
+
+  if (TARGET test)
+    add_dependencies(test unit-tests)
+    if (TARGET integration-tests)
+      add_dependencies(test integration-tests)
+    endif ()
+  endif ()
+endif ()
+
 # -- cmake export/config installations -----------------------------------------
 
 export(

@@ -127,9 +127,9 @@ RUN --mount=target=/ccache,type=cache \
       -D TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_SIMDJSON:BOOL="ON" \
       -D TENZIR_ENABLE_MANPAGES:BOOL="OFF" \
       -D TENZIR_ENABLE_PYTHON_BINDINGS_DEPENDENCIES:BOOL="ON" \
-      ${TENZIR_BUILD_OPTIONS} && \
-    cmake --build build --parallel && \
-    ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure --exclude-regex "^tenzir/" && \
+    ${TENZIR_BUILD_OPTIONS} && \
+  cmake --build build --parallel && \
+    cmake --build build --target unit-tests && \
     cmake --install build --component Runtime --prefix /opt/tenzir-runtime && \
     cmake --install build && \
     rm -rf build

@@ -813,15 +813,16 @@ function (TenzirRegisterPlugin)
     set_tests_properties(
       build-${PLUGIN_TARGET}-test
       PROPERTIES FIXTURES_SETUP tenzir_${PLUGIN_TARGET}_unit_test_fixture
-                 FIXTURES_REQUIRED tenzir_unit_test_fixture)
+                 FIXTURES_REQUIRED tenzir_unit_test_fixture LABELS unit)
     foreach (suite IN LISTS suites)
       string(REPLACE " " "_" test_name ${suite})
       add_test(NAME "plugin/${PLUGIN_TARGET}/${test_name}"
                COMMAND ${PLUGIN_TARGET}-test -v 4 -r
                        "${TENZIR_UNIT_TEST_TIMEOUT}" -s "${suite}")
       set_tests_properties(
         "plugin/${PLUGIN_TARGET}/${test_name}"
-        PROPERTIES FIXTURES_REQUIRED tenzir_${PLUGIN_TARGET}_unit_test_fixture)
+        PROPERTIES FIXTURES_REQUIRED tenzir_${PLUGIN_TARGET}_unit_test_fixture
+                   LABELS unit)
     endforeach ()
   endif ()

@@ -22,22 +22,25 @@ list(SORT test_headers)
 # Add tenzir-test executable.
 add_executable(tenzir-test ${test_sources} ${test_headers})
 TenzirTargetEnableTooling(tenzir-test)
-target_link_libraries(tenzir-test PRIVATE tenzir::test tenzir::libtenzir tenzir::internal
-                                        ${CMAKE_THREAD_LIBS_INIT})
+target_link_libraries(
+  tenzir-test PRIVATE tenzir::test tenzir::libtenzir tenzir::internal
+                      ${CMAKE_THREAD_LIBS_INIT})
 TenzirTargetLinkWholeArchive(tenzir-test PRIVATE tenzir::libtenzir_builtins)
 
 add_test(NAME build-tenzir-test
          COMMAND "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" --build "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}" --config
                  "$<CONFIG>" --target tenzir-test)
-set_tests_properties(build-tenzir-test PROPERTIES FIXTURES_SETUP
-                                                tenzir_unit_test_fixture)
+set_tests_properties(
+  build-tenzir-test PROPERTIES FIXTURES_SETUP tenzir_unit_test_fixture LABELS
+                               unit)
 
 # Enable unit testing via CMake/CTest and add all test suites.
 foreach (suite IN LISTS suites)
   string(REPLACE " " "_" test_name ${suite})
   add_test(NAME "libtenzir/${test_name}"
            COMMAND tenzir-test -v 4 -r "${TENZIR_UNIT_TEST_TIMEOUT}" -s
                    "^${suite}$" ${ARGN})
-  set_tests_properties("libtenzir/${test_name}" PROPERTIES FIXTURES_REQUIRED
-                                                         tenzir_unit_test_fixture)
+  set_tests_properties(
+    "libtenzir/${test_name}" PROPERTIES FIXTURES_REQUIRED
+                                        tenzir_unit_test_fixture LABELS unit)
 endforeach ()

@@ -119,8 +119,9 @@ endif ()
 add_test(NAME build-tenzir
          COMMAND "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" --build "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}" --config
                  "$<CONFIG>" --target tenzir)
-set_tests_properties(build-tenzir PROPERTIES FIXTURES_SETUP
-                                             "tenzir_integration_test_fixture")
+set_tests_properties(
+  build-tenzir PROPERTIES FIXTURES_SETUP "tenzir_integration_test_fixture"
+                          LABELS integration)
 
 unset(_integration_test_dirs)
 file(
@@ -140,38 +141,32 @@ foreach (dir IN LISTS _integration_test_dirs)
       "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" "-E" "chdir" "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
       "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" "-E" "env" "--modify"
       "PATH=path_list_prepend:$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>" "--"
-      "${TENZIR_UV_PATH}" "tool" "run"
-      "--python"
-      "\">=3.12\""
-      "tenzir-test"
-      "--tenzir-binary" "$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>"
-      "--tenzir-node-binary"
+      "${TENZIR_UV_PATH}" "tool" "run" "--python" "\">=3.12\"" "tenzir-test"
+      "--tenzir-binary" "$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>" "--tenzir-node-binary"
       "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node"
       "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/tests/${dir}/")
   set_tests_properties(
     "tenzir/${dir}"
-    PROPERTIES
-      WORKING_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
-      FIXTURES_REQUIRED "tenzir_integration_test_fixture")
+    PROPERTIES WORKING_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test" FIXTURES_REQUIRED
+               "tenzir_integration_test_fixture" LABELS integration)
 endforeach ()
 
-add_custom_target(integration DEPENDS tenzir)
+add_custom_target(integration-tests DEPENDS tenzir)
 add_custom_command(
-  TARGET integration
+  TARGET integration-tests
   POST_BUILD
   COMMAND
     "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" "-E" "chdir" "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
     "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" "-E" "env" "--modify"
     "PATH=path_list_prepend:$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>" "--"
-    "${TENZIR_UV_PATH}" "tool" "run"
-    "--python"
-    ">=3.12"
-    "tenzir-test"
-    "--tenzir-binary" "$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>"
-    "--tenzir-node-binary" "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node"
-    "--root" "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
-  USES_TERMINAL
-  VERBATIM)
+    "${TENZIR_UV_PATH}" "tool" "run" "--python" ">=3.12" "tenzir-test"
+    "--tenzir-binary" "$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>" "--tenzir-node-binary"
+    "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node" "--root"
+    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
+  USES_TERMINAL VERBATIM)
+
+add_custom_target(integration)
+add_dependencies(integration integration-tests)
 
 add_custom_target(update-integration DEPENDS tenzir)
 add_custom_command(
@@ -181,16 +176,11 @@ add_custom_command(
     "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" "-E" "chdir" "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
     "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" "-E" "env" "--modify"
     "PATH=path_list_prepend:$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>" "--"
-    "${TENZIR_UV_PATH}" "tool" "run"
-    "--python"
-    ">=3.12"
-    "tenzir-test"
-    "--tenzir-binary" "$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>"
-    "--tenzir-node-binary" "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node"
-    "--root" "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
-    "--update"
-  USES_TERMINAL
-  VERBATIM)
+    "${TENZIR_UV_PATH}" "tool" "run" "--python" ">=3.12" "tenzir-test"
+    "--tenzir-binary" "$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>" "--tenzir-node-binary"
+    "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node" "--root"
+    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test" "--update"
+  USES_TERMINAL VERBATIM)
 
 # Add a target for running integration tests with code coverage enabled
 if (TENZIR_ENABLE_CODE_COVERAGE)
@@ -207,15 +197,12 @@ if (TENZIR_ENABLE_CODE_COVERAGE)
       "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" "-E" "env" "--modify"
       "PATH=path_list_prepend:$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>"
       "CMAKE_COVERAGE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY=${CMAKE_COVERAGE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY}"
-      "COVERAGE_SOURCE_DIR=${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}" "--"
-      "${TENZIR_UV_PATH}" "tool" "run"
-      "--python"
-      ">=3.12"
-      "tenzir-test"
-      "--tenzir-binary" "$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>"
-      "--tenzir-node-binary" "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node"
-      "--root" "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test"
-      "--coverage" "--coverage-source-dir=${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}"
+      "COVERAGE_SOURCE_DIR=${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}" "--" "${TENZIR_UV_PATH}" "tool"
+      "run" "--python" ">=3.12" "tenzir-test" "--tenzir-binary"
+      "$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir::tenzir>" "--tenzir-node-binary"
+      "$<TARGET_FILE_DIR:tenzir::tenzir>/tenzir-node" "--root"
+      "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/test" "--coverage"
+      "--coverage-source-dir=${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}"
     COMMAND
       "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" "-E" "env"
       "VERBOSE=$<IF:$<BOOL:${CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE}>,1,0>" "--"
@@ -225,8 +212,7 @@ if (TENZIR_ENABLE_CODE_COVERAGE)
       "--tenzir-binary=$<TARGET_FILE:tenzir>"
       "--llvm-profdata=${LLVM_PROFDATA_PATH}" "--llvm-cov=${LLVM_COV_PATH}"
     COMMENT "Running integration tests with code coverage enabled"
-    USES_TERMINAL
-    VERBATIM)
+    USES_TERMINAL VERBATIM)
 endif ()
 
 add_custom_target(bats)
